items.title: Meta expands teen content controls globally, tests new Instagram tool to diversify feeds
items.summary: A “Limited Content” setting, offering an even more restrictive experience, will also be made available on Facebook and Messenger later ‌this year, Meta said
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Poland wants to ban phones and smartwatches in schools
items.summary: The Polish government has approved several bills, including one that would ban phones in the classroom.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Publishers in UK can opt out of Google AI search results
items.summary: The Competition and Markets Authority says it would put publishers "in a stronger position to negotiate content deals with Google".
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
